YouTube™ をリモート操作するための拡張機能。

スマホを YouTube™ リモコンに。
Tubecon（つべこん）は、パソコン上の YouTube をスマートフォンから操作できるアプリです。

✓離れて動画見たり音楽を聴いたりしているのに、動画が変わるたびに音量を調節しにPCまで行くのがめんどくさい！
✓就寝前の暇つぶしとして流していたが、もう寝るのでPCの前に行かずに再生を止めたい！
✓作業用BGMとして流しているが、切り替わった動画が好みではなかったのでこの場を離れずに次の動画に変えたい！

もう、PCの前に戻って操作する必要はありません。つべこんを使って、離れたところから YouTube™ をスマホで操作しましょう。

※Tubecon を利用するには、この拡張機能に加えてスマホ用アプリを導入する必要があります。また、PCとスマホが同一のWi-Fiに接続されている必要があります。詳しくは、公式サイト https://tubecon.kthree.co.jp をご確認ください。

YouTube は Google LLC の商標です。
Filter videos using a shortcut. Control your watching experience on popular platforms like YouTube, Netflix, Instagram, and more!

FilterVideo

FilterVideo detects the video, and allows you to apply the filter (blur/opacity) using a customizable keyboard shortcut.

Take control of your video viewing with FilterVideo - your companion for a more controlled watching experience.

Ever found yourself in these situations?
- Wanting to hide inappropriate content instantly while watching videos
- Watching online content with family and needing to filter sensitive moments
- Browsing YouTube or streaming platforms and wanting control over what you see
- Needing quick control over video visibility in any situation
- Wanting a more comfortable viewing experience across platforms

FilterVideo gives you instant control over any video content, whether on popular platforms like YouTube, Netflix, and Prime Video, or other websites with video content. With a single keyboard shortcut, you can instantly apply your chosen filter (blur or opacity) to the video, and adjust its intensity to your comfort level.

Key Features

- Video filters with customizable keyboard shortcut:
  - Blur filter with adjustable intensity  
  - Opacity filter with adjustable level
- Auto-filter on video detection (optional)
- NEW: Arabic-English keyboard change support:
  - Keep using the same shortcut key when switching between English and Arabic
  - Automatic key mapping for Arabic keyboards (no need to change shortcut)
  - QWERTY mapping for Arabic 101 keyboard layout
  - AZERTY mapping for Arabic 102 keyboard layout (commonly used in Algeria, Morocco, and Tunisia)
- NEW: Quick recovery feature:
  - Customizable reset shortcut key
  - Instantly recover extension functionality without opening popup
- Support for multiple platforms:
  - YouTube
  - Netflix
  - Amazon Prime Video
  - Disney Plus
  - NEW: Instagram Feed and Reels
  - NEW: TikTok
  - NEW: Coursera lecture videos
  - NEW: Support for videos opened in new tab
  - Other video platforms via iframe detection
- Global enable/disable switch
- Persistent settings across browser sessions

Platform-Specific Behavior

Mainstream Platforms (YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video, Instagram, TikTok, and more!)
- Full functionality with keyboard shortcuts working everywhere
- Filter toggles work seamlessly
- Auto-filter option available

Other Platforms (iframe detection)
FilterVideo supports iframe-based websites like Alchemiya and other movie-streaming sites.
Important: Due to cross-origin security for iframe-based video streaming, there are some limitations:
- Keyboard shortcut only works when focus is outside the video frame
- To use effectively:
  1. Zoom the page if needed (two-finger gesture) but don't toggle full screen
  2. Click just outside the video frame to ensure the shortcut works
  3. Consider using a shortcut key near your device's mute button for easier control. For example, '-' is close to the mute button on Mac.

Your Experience Matters:
- No data collection
- No external connections
- Everything happens right in your browser
- Your settings stay local

Whether you're browsing videos with family, watching content on your own, or just want more control over what you see - FilterVideo helps you create a more comfortable viewing environment with just one key press.

Usage

1. Click the FilterVideo icon in your browser toolbar
2. Use the toggle switch to enable/disable the extension
3. Choose your preferred shortcut key (default: ',')
4. Adjust filter intensity using the slider
5. Press the shortcut key while watching a video to toggle the filter

"Auto-Filter on Detection" in settings:
- Videos will automatically be filtered when detected
- Then you can toggle filter manually using the shortcut key

NEW: Arabic Keyboard Users
- No need to change your shortcut when switching between English and Arabic
- Works with both Arabic 101 (QWERTY) and Arabic 102 (AZERTY) layouts
- Example: If your shortcut is ',' (comma) in English and you use QWERTY, then switching to Arabic 101 and pressing 'ة' will also work. Similarly you use AZERTY keyboard and 'm' is your shortcut then 'ك' will also work without need to change language back and forth.
- Automatically saves your keyboard layout preference

NEW: Having Issues?
- Use the new reset shortcut key (customizable in settings)
- Instantly recover functionality without needing to open the popup and toggle off then on. Reset does that recovery with a simple key of your choice.
- Perfect for long viewing sessions or if the extension becomes unresponsive

Make every video viewing session worry-free!

Cryptocurrency wallet for the green Signum 🍀 blockchain as an extension for your browser.

An astonishing user experience to unleash the DApp power of the green Signum Blockchain Platform.

With this extension you can securely manage your Signum Accounts and interact with decentralized applications (DApps) which support Signum. You can send or receive Signa, Smart Tokens, plain or encrypted P2P messages and sign any transaction requested by third-party applications. Additionally, it's possible to create and manage Nostr accounts, thus being capable of interacting with NIP-07 compatible clients.

This extension simultaneously opens a new world for users and developers.

Signum is the foundation for our sustainable future, bringing innovative technology to the forefront.  All you need is available storage space.

What is Signum?
Signum brings a powerful blockchain solution to the world in the most sustainable way. Like Bitcoin, Signum provides a digital currency called Signa (ticker: SIGNA) that is distributed, traded and stored using a decentralized ledger system. There are no intermediaries, payment gateways, or banks. But Signum is so much more than a digital currency. 

As a customizable platform, it has the power to feature unstoppable and censorship-resistant decentralized applications. Anyone can create digital assets (tokens) that can be used in ways only limited by imagination. Exchanges, marketplaces, financial services, and games barely scratch the surface. The best part of all: It is truly sustainable when compared to other cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin or Ethereum. In addition to digital payments, Signum brings you decentralized finance, games, and applications in a way that’s secure and censorship-resistant.

All information about Signum and its native coin Signa can be found on https://signum.network/.

Detectify Recorder allows you to record interactions with a website which Application Scanning can use during security testing.

The Detectify Recorder extension is part of Detectify’s Application Scanning product. This extension records interactions with web pages that can then be replayed during scans. Recordings produced by this extension can be used for both Recorded Login and Recording Crawling.

RECORDED LOGIN
Recorded Login makes it possible to scan for vulnerabilities behind a login page. You can use the extension to record yourself logging in. Upload this recording to Detectify to include in scans.

RECORDED CRAWLING
Recorded Crawling captures a sequence of actions that will be recreated during Application Scanning. You can use the extension to record a specific flow of actions that Detectify’s crawler might otherwise miss, such as filling out complicated forms.

Not sure if you need Detectify Recorder? Get in contact with our support team: support@detectify.com.

Search within the current subdomain or within the entire domain.

CHANGES

Version 31.1

• Alt+K keyboard shortcut now works again.
• Minor bug fixes.

OVERVIEW

Search Site WE provides facilities to search within the current subdomain or within the entire domain, using a selected search engine.

TOOLBAR BUTTON AND POPUP PANEL

After installation, there will be a new green 'magnifying-glass' button on the main toolbar.

To search within a site, first click on the toolbar button to show the popup panel, then type the search terms into the text box, and then click on either of the search buttons.

Normally, the text box is filled with the text from the previous search. However, if text in the page is selected before opening the popup panel, the text box will be filled with the selected text.

CONTEXT MENU ITEMS

To search within a site, first select some text within the web page, then right-click on the selected text and choose the 'Search Site WE' menu item, and then click on either of the search sub-menu items.

SEARCH DEFAULTS

In the Options page, there are options to specify the default search settings.

KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS

To open the toolbar button popup panel, press Alt+K.

SUPPORT

Please e-mail:  dw-dev@gmx.com

LICENSE

See LICENCE.txt file and http://www.gnu.org/licenses/

All-in-one video conferencing optimization toolkit for Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, and more.

-------------------------------------- Conferfly --------------------------------------

✓ Auto-Join Meetings
tabletAutomatically joins meetings in the browser and skips the join screen. If no account is signed in, it joins as a guest using the room name. Enabling this disables Meeting Tools above and applies recommended settings.

✓ Conferfly in Kiosk Mode
Activate Conferfly's Kiosk Mode. You can enable this setting instantly or schedule it for a specific time using the option below. To exit kiosk, unlock the room if it's locked, then click the 'kiosk options' and 'Exit Kiosk' button.

✓  Enable Extension to Open Meetings On a Selected Display
When enabled, meetings open in a new window on the selected display. If Kiosk mode is enabled, they open in Kiosk mode; otherwise, they open maximized. When disabled, meetings open in a new tab.

✓ Close all Tabs/Windows and Reload Conferfly Daily at Specific Time
Enables browser clean up by automatically closing all windows and tabs at the defined time each day. Conferfly will be reloaded and will enter Kiosk Mode if enabled above. (lock the room when using this option).


-------------------------------------- Meeting Tools --------------------------------------

✓ Auto-Close Google Meet Tab
Automatically close the Google Meet tab/window when the call has ended.

✓ Auto-Launch Zoom Meetings in Browser
Automatically open Zoom meetings in your browser, bypassing annoying pop-ups. The tab/window will automatically close after the call ends.

✓ Auto-Close Zoom Tab (App Join)
Automatically close the Zoom meeting tab/window 5 seconds after joining the meeting through the Zoom app or after 15 seconds of page inactivity.

✓ Auto-Launch Microsoft Teams Meetings in Browser
Automatically open Microsoft Teams meetings in your browser when you click the meeting button. The tab/window will close after the call ends.

✓ Auto-Close Teams Tab (App Join)
Automatically close the Microsoft Teams meeting tab/window 5 seconds after joining the meeting through the Teams app or after 15 seconds of page inactivity.

✓ Auto-Launch Webex Meetings in Browser
Automatically open Webex meetings in your browser when you click the meeting button. The tab/window will close after the call ends.

✓ Auto-Close Webex Tab (App Join)
Automatically close the Webex meeting tab/window 5 seconds after joining the meeting through the Teams app or after 15 seconds of page inactivity.

✓ Auto-Close RingCentral
Automatically close the RingCentral tab/window when the call has ended.

✓ Auto-Close Dialpad
Automatically close the Dialpad tab/window when the call has ended.

✓ Auto-Close Lark
Automatically close the Lark tab/window when the call has ended.

------------------------------------------- Utility -------------------------------------------


✓ Display Exit Button on All Pages
Adds an exit button to the top left/right of the screen, as displayed on this page, to allow users to close tabs easily.

✓ Manage Incognito
Lets the extension manage Incognito windows, add an Exit button, and auto-close them at the scheduled time (if Reload Conferfly Daily is enabled).

✓ Keep Computer Awake
Prevents screen (monitor/tv) from dimming and locking without changing the power settings on the computer.

Enables users with visual impairments or blindness to create, explore, and share data visualizations.

SAS Graphics Accelerator enables users with visual impairments or blindness to create, explore, and share data visualizations. It supports alternative presentations of data visualizations that include enhanced visual rendering, text descriptions, tabular data, and interactive sonification. Sonification uses non-speech audio to convey important information about the graph. See the SAS Graphics Accelerator product page at http://support.sas.com/software/products/graphics-accelerator/ for sample graphs, documentation, and more.
 
Feedback
Your feedback will help shape the next release of SAS Graphics Accelerator. Please send questions or comments to accessibility@sas.com.

Permissions
SAS Graphics Accelerator requires the following browser permissions:
* The "Read your browsing history" permission is required for users to access accessible alternative presentations of graphs and tables within inline frames, also known as "iframes", within web pages and web apps.
* The "Manage your downloads" permission is required for users to quickly access accessible graphs and other files that are saved to the Downloads folder.
 
License Agreement
Your use of this product indicates your acceptance of the terms of the SAS Institute Inc. License Agreement for SAS Graphics Accelerator, available here: http://support.sas.com/legaldocs/Graphics_Accelerator_Chrome.pdf. If you do not agree with these terms, you are not authorized to use the product.

Records user actions on a web page and generates Cypress code for automation and testing.

Introducing Cy-Fi, the Cypress Code Generator that simplifies automation testing by recording your actions and generating Cypress code for you. This extension allows you to easily record your interactions with web pages and then automatically generates Cypress code that can be used to repeat those actions during automated testing. With this extension, you can quickly and easily create comprehensive test suites that cover all of the functionality of your web application, without the need for manual coding. Try it out today and see the difference it can make in your automation testing workflow.

What are the features?

* Uses cypress commands from @testing-library/cypress for identifying HTML elements to follow best practices in automation.
* User-friendly interface and easy navigation.
* Records clicks, typing, web navigations and form submissions.
* Automatically generates Cypress code from recorded actions.
* A code editor to edit, delete or reset the actions you performed.
* Pause and resume recording.
* Copy the generated code to your clipboard.
* Find the best selector of an element by inspecting it.
* Provides different cypress commands to play with.
* Add cypress assertions based on the element.

How to use?

* Open the extension and click on 'Play' button to begin recording actions.
* Check your actions by opening the popup at any time during recording
* Click the 'Stop' button to stop recording. 
* Click the 'Resume' button to resume recording. 
* You can also reset, or copy the generated code to your clipboard.
* Click on 'Inspect' button to start inspecting an element.
    - Click on an HTML element to get it's cy selector.
    - Press 'ESCAPE' key to continue the inspection.
* You can rearrange different cypress commands in the settings tab.
* To use assertions:
    - Start the recording by clicking on the play button.
    - Hold ALT(Win)/OPTION(Mac) + RIGHT CLICK on any HTML element to get list of 
      assertions.
    - Select one of the assertions and provide any additional input if required to generate cypress 
      code for that assertion

Prod is a simple, powerful productivity extension that helps you stay focused by blocking distracting websites and removing addictive elements (like YouTube recommended feeds). Whether you’re working, studying, or simply trying to avoid time‐sink rabbit holes, Prod lets you take control of your online experience.

Key Features:

Hide Distractions
- Turn off recommended videos, comments, or Shorts on YouTube.
- Silence clutter.

Block Sites
- Instantly block major distractions like YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and adult sites.
- Add your own custom URLs to the block list.
- If you visit a blocked site, you’ll be redirected to a sleek “Blocked by Prod” page.

Greyscale Mode
- Transform the entire web into a calmer, colorless environment.
- Perfect for those who need fewer visual triggers when working or studying.

Minimalist UI
- A clean interface with toggle switches for each feature—no clutter, no confusion.
- Quickly turn Prod on/off or tweak settings right from the extension popup.

Timer
- Set a custom timer to keep yourself on task and lock certain settings until time’s up.

Why Prod?
- Stay Focused: By blocking out distracting elements, you can devote your attention to what really matters.
- Improve Productivity: Reduce the temptation to scroll, watch, or click endlessly.
- Easy to Use: No complicated setup—just toggle on the features you want.
- Free + Sponsors: We’re working with select sponsors to keep Prod free for everyone.

Privacy & Permissions
- Prod stores your block lists and settings locally in your browser—no personal data is sent to our servers (unless you choose to share it).
- We only request the permissions we need to hide or block content on specific sites.

Support & Feedback
- Homepage URL: https://prodextension.com
- Support: https://discord.gg/9by8nGxd8F
- Join our community Discord for bug reports, feature requests, and general discussion.

How to Use
- Install Prod from the Chrome Web Store.
- Pin the extension in your browser toolbar for quick access.
- Open the Prod popup to enable/disable features like Hide Recommended, Block Sites, or Greyscale.
- Adjust your custom block list if you want to add more sites.
- Get back to your tasks with fewer distractions!

Updates & Roadmap
- We’ll be rolling out new features.
- Keep an eye on our Discord or Twitter for the latest announcements.

Disclaimer
- Prod is not affiliated with or endorsed by YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, or Twitter.
- The blocking and hiding features are user-configurable and are provided “as is.”
- By installing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

Install Prod now and start boosting your online productivity.

Updates
0.27 - Better input isolation & minor blocklist fix
0.26 - Fixed url blocking bug
0.25 - Minor fix
0.24 - Added the option to make donations
0.23 - Fixed videos being paused on play when shorts are hidden
0.22 - More aggressive shorts blocking, small redesign & bug fixes
Use this extension to annotate (edit, highlight, popup/embedded notes & page notes) your web-pages.

Use this extension to annotate: highlight, edit, add popup notes, and page notes on web pages as you browse. The extension saves your changes locally, and next time the same URL is visited, the web page is replaced by your annotated version.  

Click on the extension icon (page action button) next to the address bar to see different options. Restarting the browser is required/recommended after the initial installation.

Please note that your feedback is very important to us. Thus, please let us know how you feel about it (good, bad, nothing... anything) by reviewing it. It will help us improve the extension and also motivate us to work on it.  

Privacy and legal document: https://neural2-0.github.io/Legal.html  
FAQs: https://neural2-0.github.io/FAQ.html  

Ver 1.8
- Bug fix with Chrome update

Ver 1.7  
- Manifest V3 and bug fix.  

Ver 1.6  
- Changed search page for some monetization.  

Ver 1.4  
- Features added  
  - Page notes  
  - Annotation indicator (via color of extension button)  
- UX enhanced.  
- Bug fixes.  

Ver 1.3  
- Features added  
  - Popup notes  
  - View all highlights and notes for a page  
  - Search annotated pages  
- Bug fixes.  

Ver 1.2  
- Remove highlight functionality added.  
- Bug fixes.  

Limitations:  
- Changes at the source (actual pages) for annotated pages won’t be visible, as the page is replaced by the locally stored annotated version.  
- As annotated pages are saved locally, their lifespan depends on the extension remaining installed.

Manage Google Calendar Duplicate Events to quickly copy events. Use Google Calendar Copy Event to save time and simplify scheduling.

The Google Calendar Duplicate Event app helps users quickly copy appointments within GCal. Whether you're copying a single event or an entire series, this tool saves time and improves efficiency. With Google Calendar duplicate events, you can manage recurring tasks or meetings more easily, adapting them to new dates or needs. Additionally, if you're looking to manage copy events on Google Calendar, this app simplifies the process.

Who It’s For:

This app is designed for anyone who uses Google Calendar regularly. It's especially useful for:
✒️ Busy professionals who need to create recurring tasks like meetings or appointments quickly using the Google Calendar copy event feature.
✒️ Teams and employees using integrations like PracticeWorks Google Calendar Integration, needing to duplicate tasks across different projects.
✒️ Anyone managing multiple events, like holidays or weekly meetings.

What's Inside:

The Google Calendar Duplicate Event app offers a variety of tools to streamline your scheduling process and improve appointments management. Among its key features:
📌 Duplication of Individual Events — The app allows you to create an exact copy of a single event, with the ability to adjust details such as the date, time, and location.
📌 Bulk Duplication — If you need to replicate multiple events at once, the app provides the functionality to duplicate several tasks simultaneously. This feature is particularly useful for handling recurring events or scheduling similar activities across different days.
📌 Drag-and-Drop Event Duplication — With the Google Calendar duplicate drag-and-drop feature, you can quickly move events to new dates within the calendar, avoiding the need to manually recreate each task.
📌 Managing Duplicate Events — After copying, users can hide or manage any redundant entries that may clutter their calendar, ensuring a clean and organized view.
📌 Holiday Management — The app helps users manage holidays or other recurring events that may be duplicated in the calendar, making it easier to remove or modify them.

How It Works:

Here’s how to copy events in Google Calendar:
1. Select the Event: To duplicate a calendar appointment in GCal.
2. Adjust Event Details: Modify the time, date, and description if necessary. This is helpful when you need to copy set of events in GCal.
3. Drag-and-Drop Duplication: For event drag, simply drag the event to a new date.
4. Duplicate Multiple Events: Select several appointments to duplicate them all at once, without the need to manually recreate each one.
5. Export to Tasks: Export event in calendar into tasks google calendar to organize meetings in one place.
6. Moving All-Day Events: If you want to move all-day appointments to the top of your calendar, the app helps you organize your schedule in a more intuitive way.

Advantages:

The Google Calendar Duplicate Event app offers several key benefits that can enhance the efficiency of managing events:
🔹 Time Efficiency — By enabling the quick duplication of events, this tool significantly reduces the time required to create new tasks. Whether you're scheduling one-off meetings or recurring tasks, the app allows for rapid copying of events with minimal effort.
🔹 Flexibility in Customization — Once events are duplicated, users can easily adjust the details such as time, location, or description. This flexibility is particularly valuable when needing to copy events in Google Calendar for different dates or to match specific requirements.
🔹 Mass Duplication — For users managing a high volume of appointments, such as meetings, or tasks, the app’s ability to copy  multiple events in Google Calendar streamlines this process. This functionality is ideal for those who need to replicate large sets of appointments quickly and efficiently.
🔹 Integrated Task Management — The app also offers the ability to turn events in calendar into tasks Google Calendar, turning important meetings or deadlines into actionable tasks. This ensures that both your calendar and task lists are synchronized and well-organized.
🔹 Handling Holiday and Special Events — The app makes it easy to manage holidays or other special dates that may be duplicated on Google Calendar. This feature helps ensure that such events are properly handled and do not overwhelm the calendar view.

Conclusion:

If you need an efficient way to handle appointments in GCal, the Google Calendar Duplicate Event app is a powerful tool. It helps you save time by duplicating, modifying, and managing events, making scheduling simpler. Whether you need to manage recurring meetings, tasks, or projects, the app ensures your calendar remains organized and efficient, improving productivity. Plus, with features like managing duplicate events on Google Calendar and learning how to copy tasks, you’ll be able to streamline your workflow with ease.
Analyze SEO, SERP rankings, and site performance instantly with the AI-powered RankingsFactor Chrome Extension.

RankingsFactor is a smart, fast, and privacy-friendly Chrome extension designed to supercharge your website’s SEO and performance. Whether you’re an SEO professional, digital marketer, developer, blogger, or business owner, RankingsFactor puts real-time analysis and AI-powered SEO recommendations right at your fingertips.

With just one click, scan any webpage and get instant feedback on key SEO elements including meta tags, heading structure (H1–H6), canonical URLs, keyword usage, structured data, and more. Powered by AI-driven insights, RankingsFactor doesn’t just highlight issues — it delivers actionable suggestions to fix them and boost your search visibility.

Go beyond surface-level audits with Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, FID), load speed, and user experience metrics. The extension also checks for mobile responsiveness, accessibility, indexability, broken links, and LLM optimization — all displayed in a clean, easy-to-use dashboard.

✅ Key Features

One-click SEO & technical audits

AI-powered improvement suggestions

Core Web Vitals & speed insights

On-page keyword optimization analysis

Broken link & indexability checker

Mobile-friendly & accessibility overview

Privacy-first: runs locally, zero tracking

LLM Optimization status & alerts

💡 Why RankingsFactor?

Unlike heavy SEO tools, RankingsFactor is lightweight, fast, and beginner-friendly. It’s built for performance-focused teams who need quick, actionable insights without bloated dashboards or expensive subscriptions.

Whether you’re optimizing your own site or auditing a competitor, RankingsFactor gives you the clarity and direction you need instantly.

📌 FAQs.

1. What is RankingsFactor?
An AI-powered SEO Chrome extension that delivers instant website audits and performance analysis in one click.

2. Is it free?
Yes. Core SEO features are free, with optional advanced AI insights.

3. Who can use it?
SEO experts, marketers, developers, bloggers, and business owners.

4. How does it improve SEO?
By scanning meta tags, headings, keywords, structured data, Core Web Vitals, and indexability — then giving AI-driven suggestions.

5. Does it track my data?
No. RankingsFactor is privacy-friendly and runs locally in your browser.

6. Can I analyze competitor websites?
Yes. Instantly audit any live webpage, including competitors.

7. Does it check Core Web Vitals?
Absolutely — including LCP, CLS, FID, and load speed.

8. Why choose RankingsFactor?
It’s lightweight, fast, AI-powered, and easy for beginners while powerful enough for pros.

9. Do I need technical skills?
No. Anyone can run an audit in seconds.

10. How do I start?
Install RankingsFactor from the Chrome Web Store, visit any webpage, click the icon, and run your audit instantly.

11. Can RankingsFactor check LLM optimization?
Yes. It analyzes your page content and provides a clear LLM optimization status with suggestions to improve AI comprehension.

12. Why is LLM optimization important?
Optimizing for LLMs ensures better AI interpretation of your content, improving automated content analysis, AI-driven suggestions, and search visibility.
Extension that allows you to interact with webpages and the browser using your voice and talon or your keyboard

Rango is an extension that helps you interact with web pages using your voice and talon. It does this by drawing hints with letters next to elements that you can use to click, hover, copy or show link addresses and more. It also helps you to close tabs, open a link in a new tab and open multiple link in new tabs without focusing them.

 - Personalize your bump message!

More features are in development right now!
Instantly auto-generate the most robust locator including Xpath, CSS selector and more for use with Selenium or Protractor.

Save time by letting POM Builder instantly suggest the most reliable locator for your inspected web element. The suggestion might be either XPath, CSS selector, By.id, By.name, By.linkText, etc. You can use these locators for all automation frameworks including Selenium, Protractor, Robot Framework, webdriver.io, TestArchitect Enterprise and TestArchitect Gondola.

WHO IS IT FOR? 
* Test automation engineers who specialize in web testing using Selenium, Protractor, Robot Framework, webdriver.io and TestArchitect Automation Suite.

WHY USE IT?
SMART GEN
* POM Builder automatically generates the best locator for your web element of interest. The best locator should be [1] short, [2] reliable and [3] easy to understand.
* POM Builder’s smart algorithm automatically detects and ignores dynamic IDs generated by some front-end frameworks.
* If you don’t want to use the suggested locator or if your project’s convention dictates a certain type of locators, you can manually select the locator type that fits you best.

LOCATOR TEST
* You can evaluate the suggested locator or your customized locator to check whether that locator can uniquely identify the web element of interest.

POM CODE GEN
* After designing the best locator for your web element, POM Builder can help you generate the corresponding POM code snippet. You can paste this code snippet directly into your Selenium, Protractor and TestArchitect project.

NOTES:
* POM Builder does not track your browsing history in any way, nor does it transmit any data over the internet. All data remains on your local hard disk drive at all times. However, POM Builder needs "webNavigation" permissions in order to generate locators for elements inside iFrames.

WHAT'S NEW
* Version: 1.1.8
- Chrome extension manifest v3 migration

* Version: 1.1.7
- Shadow DOM support

* Version: 1.0.129
- Minor bug fixes

* Version: 1.0.124
- Added more information to the popup window
- Minor bug fixes

* Version: 1.0.104
- Generates frame path for an element located inside an iFrame
- Add escape sequences to output locator, if required.
- Improve UI/UX for POM Template Configuration feature: change behaviors of saving and reset functions.
- Improve UI/UX for Smart Gen feature: auto-hide non value field.
- Improve xPath and Css algorithm.
- Fix some other issues reported by our dear users.
Known Issues:
- Test Locator does not work properly in auto-redirect website.
- Locator values are not refreshed if user inspects the control in another frame then inspects back to exactly previous element.

Easily use Change Font Size extension — a smart font size changer for comfortable reading and big text on any website.

🌟 Discover an effective way to improve your browsing and reading comfort with our Chrome extension made to help you quickly change font size across webpages, emails, and online editors. Instead of zooming whole pages, this tool lets you fine-tune the text size while keeping layouts intact. It’s an intuitive and flexible solution for anyone who needs to change text scale regularly.

💎 The extension is built for users who value readability and personalization. Whether you’re reading an article, composing an email, or working with HTML, it gives you instant control over the font size displayed on your screen. If you’ve ever asked how to change font size in Gmail or how to enlarge text in HTML, this tool brings the answer directly to your browser.

🚀 Main features
1️⃣ One-click toolbar for easy access.
2️⃣ Adjustable slider for immediate text resizing.
3️⃣ Works on Gmail, news sites, blogs, and web apps.
4️⃣ Fully compatible with Windows, macOS, and Linux.
5️⃣ Uses optimized CSS text scaling for stable rendering.

📈 You don’t need to reload pages or change browser settings — simply open the toolbar, move the slider, and your new font size is applied instantly. The extension remembers your last setting, so your preferred layout and text size remain next time you open the same site. 

✨ Why users choose it
💠 It’s lightweight and accurate — you can change text in real time without any lag.
💠 Keeps design elements aligned while adjusting font display.
💠 Automatically adapts to various website structures.
💠 Lets web developers preview and change content during testing without modifying code.
💠 Perfect for accessibility, design validation, or general daily use.

👥 For front-end professionals, the tool allows quick review of layouts at different font sizes, ensuring proper text flow. For readers, it’s simply a better way to make online content visually comfortable without zooming entire pages.

🧐 How it works
1. Open any webpage or gmail tab.
2. Click the toolbar icon.
3. Move the slider to change font size instantly.
4. Continue browsing — the chosen size stays active automatically.

🔁 If you switch to another site and want to adjust again, just repeat the process. You can change type appearance, fine-tune line height, and keep your preferred font size saved for future use.

📖 Extra advantages
✔ Keeps your chosen settings across sessions.
✔ Works smoothly even with multiple browser tabs.
✔ Great for people who prefer large fonts or softer text contrast.
✔ Ideal for online studying, writing, and reading long documents.
✔ Designed with accessibility and usability in mind.

🖥️ The extension helps those who frequently need to change font size on the computer or inside editors. It automatically balances text spacing and layout so you can focus on the content. Whether you want small type for compact view or bigger text for comfort, it gives you consistent results every time.

🎉 What users love
➤ Simple, intuitive controls that respond instantly.
➤ Ready-made presets and custom scaling.
➤ Reliable across browsers, devices, and languages.
➤ Perfect for reading, coding, or editing.
➤ Doesn’t distort images or buttons — only adjusts font rendering.

🎓 Unlike traditional zoom, this solution focuses only on the font layer. It lets you change proportions without altering interface elements, making it ideal for anyone who reads or edits frequently. You can also compare font sizes across sites to maintain visual consistency in your projects. 

📝 Getting started
🔹 Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store.
🔹 Click the toolbar icon once it’s added.
🔹 Adjust text scale instantly using the slider.
🔹 Your chosen font size will stay active automatically.
🔹 You can change again anytime for other pages or editors.

🕺 In just a few seconds, you’ll notice how clear and comfortable text becomes. Whether reviewing documents, answering mail, or reading news, being able to change style text precisely makes your workflow smoother and easier for the eyes.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions:
📌 Can I use it for free? 
💡 Yes, extension is available as a free Chrome extension.
📌 How do I install? 
💡 To install Change Font Size, go to the Chrome Web Store and select "Add to Chrome". It will be added to your browser, and you can start using it.
📌 Is my privacy protected when using extension? 
💡 Absolutely! Extension operates locally within your browser, ensuring the privacy and security of your personal information. It does not collect or store any user data.
❓ I have some ideas and feedback for Change Font Size. Can I share them with the developers? 
💡 Absolutely! Our team is always open to hearing from our users. Don't hesitate to send in your proposals, ideas, or reviews. We value what you have to say.
❓ How do I change font size in HTML or CSS without editing code? 
💡 The extension solves that — it modifies the rendered text only, leaving your content and markup untouched.

👍 In summary
🥇 The Change Font Size extension provides complete control over text presentation. It’s efficient, responsive, and built to enhance every reading experience. No matter what website you use — Gmail, HTML editors, or personal blogs — you can always change text to match your comfort and style.
⏳ If you’ve ever searched for how to change text scale in Gmail, how to adjust type in HTML, or how to make text easier to read on your computer, this is the solution. Install it today and enjoy a cleaner, clearer, and perfectly scaled browsing experience.
